reviews.title: The stay was stressful.
reviews.positives: The ambience and the location were good.
reviews.negatives: I had booked a particular size of room but at the time of checkin I was told that the room was not available and that the Hotel upgraded my room. However, the room I received was extremely congested with little space to move around. The ambience wasn’t very appealing since the room was pretty dark and had few dim lights. Additionally, by accident I was locked because my daughter was sleeping and the staff on duty was not too friendly, and were irritated that they had to attend to the issue. At a 5 star hotel it was surprising that the staff needed the guest to go downstairs to replace the key. I don’t plan to go back again to Sofitel in HCM.

reviews.title: sofitel
reviews.text:
Very good staff, either back of the house and front of the house.
Receptionist Ms Zoey been very polite and professional, also Concierge, very helpful, breakfast also good, and FB staff well trained, good job. 

Room 1505 very clean and tidy, very good mattress and bed, comfy sleep despite the noises from outside, Rest room amenities fine.

Few Remark to the management 
 With the letter informing of the noises , you may supply one time use earplugs ?
They will not ruin your PnL .

The hotel its at the point that need some 'refreshments"  to keep it in perfect state, such replacing the window glass with more insulated one, will reduce the outside noises.

Fixing the air cons systems as its too cool even at 27 celsius, its a job to be considered.
The air con grille, look blackish that not even a heavy clean and repaint may fix it,  what about replacement?

The rest room with that  "make up" at the bathtub to make it almost a shower looks cheap, 3 stars standard, there is space to make a not large but still a decent shower, get UOL to invest in quality!
due this in restroom i give 4 points instead of the maximum 5 points 

if i pass again in HCM city i will stay again in your property

reviews.title: Bien confort mais maintenant y’a nettement mieux plus moderne pour le même prix
reviews.positives:
*La piscine en rooftop très agréable ainsi que ces horaires d’ouverture. 
*Literie très confortable. 
*Les serviettes de toilettes et de piscine d’un agréable confort et bien épaisses
*le coiffeur le Barbarrd super prestations: j’ai les cheveux très très court et c’est la première fois qu’il coupait les cheveux aussi court pour une femme et vraiment une belle réussite ! Vraiment je recommande
reviews.negatives:
*Les oreilles sont bcp bcp trop moelleux: tellement moelleux que les bords remontent sur le visage quand on s’installe dessus ! 
*la wifi n’est vraiment pas de bonne qualité : on travail et très très souvent des coupures donc en pleine conférence audio il faut se reconnecter sans arrêt c’est pénible ! 
*Petite mésaventure : j’avais mis la pancarte « ne pas déranger» un matin car je travaillais et j’entends la porte s’ouvrir et se refermer, je sors pour voir et je vois juste le chariot des femmes de ménage / je vais dans la salle de bain et la
 De nouveau la porte qui s’ouvre mais avant cette fois ci elle avait le temps de frapper ! Je fais couler de l’eau et j’entends la porte se refermer! J’AI MIS LA PANCARTE « DO NOT DISTRUB!!!!! »
Donc merci de respecter ! 
* Nous avons mangé au resto ( celui du petit dej) le samedi midi: elle nous installe à une table et il y avait sur la chaise une trace de quelque chose je regarde et apparement c’était du miel puisque ça collait: je le montre à la serveuse elle m’adresse un sourire et voilà ! Je lui montre que je veux changer de chaise et lui explique qu’il faut nettoyer ! Et bien elle a juste interchange  la chaise avec la table d’à côté et voilà ! Pas nettoyé rien ! Donc la prochaine personne qui va s’asseoir dessus aura une trace de miel déçu🥺😒
*Aurait besoin d’une petite fraîcheur : les abat-jour ne sont plus très droit / les murs plus très blanc.

I stayed there for a week and then again for a night during business travel. 
Got a classic corner room which was really old and depressing with a small window. Rooms are low height rooms and old styled . Though they have tried to keep it well. Bathrooms are also quite old styled with no need of outdated bathtub occupying unnecessary space.  Gor last 2 nights they moved me to another room with bigger window view which was slightly better with more sunlight in the room.

Location is good, close to eating places and shopping areas.
Amenities are good and well maintained, nice breakfast, Spa and Gym.
The Bar too was nice, most of the time hotel was overcrowded with tourists groups though.

Its an ok stay for a night or 2 but not for longer stay.

reviews.title: Expected more
reviews.text:
Stayed all around Vietnam and expected more from a 5 Star. There was no bottled water in rooms - they provided filtered water which I did not like the taste of, paid more for a city view room which was half blocked by the corner balcony due to the room we were given.  We weren’t feeling great at night and had just run out of Panadol - asked reception if we could get any and said no, we had to get our own (there were no pharmacies nearby too). 
To be honest, we’ve stayed at 4 stars which was better value for money, staff were more caring and attentive to guest needs - Sofitel experience was average at best. Don’t waste your money - better value for money out there.
reviews.response:

We continuously strive to improve and will use your insights to address these shortcomings. We appreciate your candid feedback and hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a much better experience in the future.

Sincerely,

Huyen Dang
Brand & Quality Control Manager

reviews.title: Front desk service failed the hotel
reviews.text:
I had requested for a quiet room as I am a light sleeper. I was woken up by shouting guests on the same floor in the middle of the night. Eventually I realised most of the rooms at that floor were assigned to guests from a particular country likely on group package. They shouted across the corridor even in the day. 
The room assigned had a card slot which I had to force the card in, to activate the power in the room. I only realised on the last day, there should be a card permanently slot in for other rooms. 
The front desk staff were smiling but not genuine. They offered rehearsed answers without showing interest to your feedback. My credit card was used to place a deposit. In the end they still collected a fee when they “returned” the deposit. This should be made known to guests and not assumed people will be fine. It is a matter of being honest. I will advise others to book the other hotels nearer to town instead..

reviews.title: A Trace of France in Vietnam
reviews.positives:
Sofitel is, as always, unmistakably French. That much holds true wherever you are in the world—but somehow, it feels especially poignant here in Vietnam. Even though it’s been more than 80 years since the end of colonial rule, there are still places where France lingers—not as a shadow, but as a scent in the air. Sofitel Saigon is one of them.

The hotel is in excellent condition. The staff are warm, polished, and effortlessly gracious. The service is precise without being stiff. Breakfast is superb. Everything simply works as it should. There’s a certain ease in the experience, as if the hotel understands what you need before you ask.
reviews.negatives:
Still, I’ve stayed at Sofitel in New York—and, truth be told, I had a slightly better experience there. I can’t quite explain why. It may have been the team. There was something in the energy, the attention to detail, the pride in the small things. A sense that every part of the guest experience had been thought through, down to the texture of the linen and the angle of the desk chair.

Here in Saigon, this is still France—but softened by time and distance. A dignified, well-run hotel with a gentle heartbeat. Not perfect. But memorable.

reviews.title: Best choice in Ho Chi Minh!
reviews.text:
Staying at Sofitel was enough for our family to have a great vacation in every aspect.

The staff were very nice and supportive, the room with one king bed was big enough for three of us (two adults and one 9-year-old child), and the breakfast buffet was full of delicious and enjoyable options (American, Indian, as well as Vietnamese food; my daughter was so excited about the chocolate fondue and ice cream!). We enjoyed the rooftop pool every day - the main pool is 1.3m deep and there is a separate shallow pool which is good for toddlers. It was the perfect place to relax with drinks from the pool bar and enjoy the great 360-degree view. Meanwhile, we were surprised with a beautiful birthday cake and a card with a hand drawing of us, since I had mentioned earlier that this trip was to celebrate my and my daughter's birthdays together. It made our stay even more special!

Five minutes' walk to the right, there is a zoo and a museum, and to the left, there are a post office and a book street.

I will definitely stay again at Sofitel when I come back to Ho Chi Minh City next time!

reviews.title: A little old but very lux
reviews.text:
Prime location, services are top notch. The breakfast buffet is really nice and it runs until 10.30am which is quite comfy comparing to other places I've been at, usually breakfast ends at 9.30 or at most 10.

Room quality is also nice, good bed, good pillow, good decor, good aircon, but there are quite a bit of wear-and-tear, and it's just quite... bare somehow. I guess they mainly cater to foreign guests so most of the electrical sockets in the room aren't suitable for Vietnam plugs - there are a few but none near the bed. There's only a tub and no shower cubicle, which I personally do not prefer.

Not too sound-proof, my neighbour's kid cried all the time and it was pretty loud. However there's no noise from the street. This area also almost never has any ongoing construction because it's smack right in between embassies and office buildings that are already there.

Wifi is good.

For the price, it ticks all boxes. For my staycation experience, I expected a tiny bit more with in-room design - not just the decor but also functionality.

reviews.title: Great hotel, just not quite worth the room rate paid
reviews.text: Sofitel is in a great location, staff very friendly and efficient and rooms are clean. For a USD200+ price per night stay i expected a bit more. Breakfast was buffet style with plenty on offer. Downside for us was bed comfort was not as pleasant as mattress quite hard. Despite changing the temperature of the AC .........the room remained extremely cold so i doubt the thermostat was working. For showering, you have to stand in a bathtub and when your older that can be quite precarious .......expected a proper shower cubicle.  Light control is a bit of a nightmare as the "master" control was not working so each light had to be individually switched off before sleeping. No information in rooms regarding hotel restaurant, room service or available tours. I am guessing expectation was to use the hotel website for information. Other than that, we enjoyed our few days and would consider staying again.

The hotel asked him to send a picture of his bank card by email to proceed the payment under his name even they already have his full bank card number.

The gym was big and spacious completed with daily fitness Yoga and Zumba class.  There is even a suana in the lockers room and the steam bath!  I am very impressed with the cleanliness as well.

Thank you Sofitel, this is the best hotel I ever stayed in HCM and I will be back.

reviews.text: The room initially arranged for us is too closed to the public area,  where people outside can easily look into the room. So we have to ask to change the room, that is smaller than our booking but we accepted that. Then all electricity outlets in the room are 3 hole-outlet; which is not popular in Vietnam. And there is only 1 converter outlet in the room; I have to request one more in my room(the hotel did not offer or mention anything  about it with us. maybe they assumed Vietnam used same outlet as Singapore...). Besides, one outlet closest to the bed is too loose to use, another is broken. The officer helped to fix after we called the reception. One more thing is the toilet having no bidet sprayer and the shower area always get wet after we used. It might be due to the old-fashioned design which is not effective  for showering. I have a feeling that the hotel did not respect us as other customer because we are customer via Agoda.

reviews.text:
My first and foremost impression lied with the unexpected generosity of the GM of Sofitel: Mr. Mario Mendis.  I simply asked for an 1-2 hour early check-in due to the rescheduling of my transportation services, but he warmly offered me a half day early checkin plus half day late checkout.  My travel plans didn’t allow me to fully enjoy that lovely offer, but I truly appreciated this hospitable GM of Sofitel.  

Of course, Sofitel is one of the Top Deluxe Hotels in HCMC, everything was great to me.  Just some minor inconvenience with in-room power sockets but the receptionists appreciated my constructive comments and hopefully looked for upcoming renovation.  Break fast  was great, their French Toast is one of a kind (mus try!).

reviews.title: Absurb policy and disrespectful staff
reviews.text: The hotel policy is that guests have to pay for service on site. I am fine with that and paid my drinks and dinner at the hotel while staying there. But when you go for a swim and certainly you don’t bring a wallet with you.  I book a bottle of beer to my room and the moment I got back to my room from the swim, I got a call from reception desk which requested me to go back up to the pool to pay for my beer. Then I asked if I could pay at the reception desk, the lady said it was fine but I needed to go down as soon as possible. What kind of customer policy and service was that. Very disappointed and definitely won’t return to that horrible treatment. Sofitel Saigon was not worthy of a 5 star hotel status.

reviews.title: Very good hotel in HCMC
reviews.text:
Great hotel in great location. 

It's a 5-star hotel with all amenities although I found the furniture in the room was not really 5-star. However, no real complaints here.

Staff is very friendly.

Great breakfast buffet and cafe restaurant.

Very good gym (for a hotel gym). Didn't check out the pool.

Would definitely come back.

reviews.title: Good service, nice breakfast
reviews.text: Sofitel can't really go wrong in any countries, so does this one.  Classic decoration, nice breakfast, outstanding service, clean and good size room. The only drawback is location as there are nothing much around in walking distance, but quiet for business traveller so I dont complain.
